content: Official SQLite documentation supports application-controlled user_version and application_id fields, transactional rollback or WAL recovery, WAL snapshot reads, online backup snapshots, and integrity_check plus foreign_key_check. WAL adds -wal and -shm files that must remain with the database and needs checkpoint management. Use a single writer store, transactional command persistence, pre-migration online backups, explicit forward schema migrations, and startup integrity checks without putting any database access on the live render path.
